name: round altar room
description: I'm in a round altar room
hints: A round altar room with a blood-stained altar. Multiple exits lead deeper.
LOO ALT to examine the altar. It may hide something underneath.
E leads to the hieroglyphics room (treasure room!). S leads to the crawlway.
This is a hub room. E=hieroglyphics/treasure room (15), S=crawlway (17), N=hallway with oyster (13).
notes: Round altar room - hub. Blood-stained altar may hide items. N=hallway (13), S=crawlway (17), E=hieroglyphics/treasure room (15).
